title: carex breviculmis var. cupulifera
intro: Carex breviculmis var. cupulifera, commonly known as the dwarf sedge, is a type of grass-like perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include the potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or it can be used as a component in tinctures and salves.
